paper_title: PVT-SSD: Single-Stage 3D Object Detector with Point-Voxel Transformer
summary: The paper proposes PVT-SSD, a single-stage 3D object detector designed to overcome the computational complexity of Transformers on large point clouds and the drawbacks of existing point-based and voxel-based methods. The core approach is to convert points to a small number of voxels and then adaptively fuse features from both representations to preserve long-range context and accurate position information.

problem_addressed.primary: The quadratic complexity of self-attention in Transformers, which leads to high computational and memory costs for large point clouds.
secondary_drawbacks: Point-based methods require time-consuming Farthest Point Sampling (FPS).
Voxel-based methods introduce quantization errors during voxelization, losing accurate position information.

proposed_solution.core_idea: A hybrid method that combines the advantages of point and voxel representations.
proposed_solution.methodology: The method converts points to a small number of voxels using sparse convolutions. It then samples these non-empty voxels to reduce the runtime of FPS. Inside the model, voxel features are adaptively fused with point features to compensate for quantization errors.

key_components.name: Query Initialization
key_components.description: Provides queries with better initial positions and instance-related features. Queries originate from non-empty voxels to reduce sampling time.
process: Collapse 3D voxels into 2D voxels along the height dimension.
Sample a representative set of 2D voxels.
Lift the sampled 2D voxels to generate 3D reference points.
Project reference points onto a BEV feature map to obtain content queries.

key_components.name: Point-Voxel Transformer
key_components.description: Captures long-range contextual features from voxel tokens and fine-grained point features from point tokens. These tokens are adaptively fused by a cross-attention layer based on their similarity to content queries.

token_types.voxel_tokens: Obtained from non-empty voxels around reference points to capture a large attention range.
token_types.point_tokens: Generated from neighboring points near reference points to retain fine-grained information.

key_components.name: Virtual Range Image
key_components.description: Accelerates the neighbor querying process in the Point-Voxel Transformer. It allows reference points to quickly find neighbors and can handle overlapping points from multiple sensors or multi-frame fusion.

performance: Achieves competitive results on the KITTI, Waymo Open Dataset, and nuScenes benchmarks.
title: PVT-SSD: Single-Stage 3D Object Detector with Point-Voxel Transformer
